hero: A short, punchy line about how you work goes here.

sections.heading: A Section Heading
sections.body: Use this space to talk about your background, your approach, or what makes your work distinct. Two to four short sections works well — replace this copy with your own.

sections.heading: Another Section Heading
sections.body: Keep going here with a second theme: the kinds of problems you like to solve, the industries you've worked in, or how you like to collaborate with clients.

sections.heading: A Third Section
sections.body: Add or remove sections freely from the CMS — this whole page, including these headings and paragraphs, is editable.

tiles.title: Start-Ups
tiles.body: Describe how you work with early-stage teams.

tiles.title: Non-Profits
tiles.body: Describe how you work with mission-driven organizations.

tiles.title: Government Agencies
tiles.body: Describe how you work with public-sector clients.

tiles.title: Corporations
tiles.body: Describe how you work with larger organizations and teams.

dataPoints.heading: Other Data Points
facts: Replace this with a fun fact about you
Add as many or as few facts as you'd like
These show up one at a time on the About page
Visitors can click to roll for another one
